seo.title: WAN 2.7 Video Generation | Try WAN 2.7 Online | LazyKiwi
seo.description: WAN 2.7 by Tencent generates high-quality videos from text and images. Advanced AI model for realistic video creation with precise control and motion.

hero.headline: Generate High-Quality Videos from **Text and Images**
hero.tagline: Tencent's advanced video generation model for creators and developers
hero.description: WAN 2.7 transforms text prompts and images into coherent video content with natural motion and visual consistency. The model handles multi-scene generation, character animation, and dynamic camera movements. Input your description or reference image, configure duration and style parameters, and export production-ready video sequences for content creation, prototyping, and visual storytelling.
hero.name: WAN 2.7

steps.title: Three steps from idea to video
steps.description: Transform your creative vision into professional video content with WAN 2.7's intuitive workflow and advanced generation capabilities.

items.title: Select model and describe scene
items.description: Choose WAN 2.7 from the model library and enter your text prompt describing the video scene, action, camera movement, and visual style you want to create.
items.image_prompt: Clean modern UI showing WAN 2.7 video model selected in a dropdown menu, with a text input field containing a detailed prompt like 'cinematic drone shot of a sunset over mountain range, smooth forward motion'. Interface has minimal design with purple accent colors.

items.title: Configure video settings and parameters
items.description: Adjust duration, resolution, frame rate, and motion intensity. Fine-tune camera controls, aspect ratio, and creative parameters to match your production requirements and artistic direction.
items.image_prompt: Parameter panel showing sliders and dropdowns for video settings: duration set to 8 seconds, resolution at 1080p, frame rate 24fps, motion intensity slider at medium, aspect ratio selector showing 16:9, with preview thumbnail visible on right side.

items.title: Generate and export your video
items.description: Click generate to create your video. Review the output with playback controls, make iterations if needed, then download in your preferred format and resolution for immediate use.
items.image_prompt: Video player interface showing generated video with playback controls at bottom, progress bar, quality selector dropdown, download button with format options (MP4, WebM), and a 'Generate variation' button. Clean, professional layout with the generated video prominently displayed.

capabilities.title: What sets WAN 2.7 apart
capabilities.description: Tencent's WAN 2.7 delivers production-ready video generation through advanced physics simulation, temporal consistency, and precise motion control. Built for creators who need reliable, high-quality output at scale, it handles complex scenarios while maintaining photorealistic detail across extended sequences.

items.title: True-to-life physics in every frame
items.description: WAN 2.7 simulates real-world physics with exceptional accuracy, from fluid dynamics to material interactions. Objects move, collide, and respond naturally, eliminating the uncanny artifacts that plague other video models.
items.image_prompt: A high-speed camera shot of a water balloon bursting on impact, with precise droplet physics, realistic surface tension, and accurate light refraction through the water particles, shot against a dark background with dramatic lighting

items.title: Consistent quality across long sequences
items.description: Advanced temporal models ensure characters, objects, and environments maintain visual consistency throughout extended clips. No flickering, morphing, or identity drift—just stable, continuous motion that holds together frame by frame.
bullets: Zero subject drift in extended clips
items.image_prompt: A continuous tracking shot following a person walking through different rooms in a modern house, showing consistent facial features, clothing details, and lighting transitions, with smooth camera movement and stable architectural elements throughout

items.title: Granular control over every movement
items.description: Fine-tuned motion controls let you specify exact trajectories, speeds, and transformations. From subtle facial expressions to complex camera choreography, WAN 2.7 translates intent into precise motion without compromise.
items.image_prompt: A split-screen demonstration showing a drone's complex 3D flight path on the left (with trajectory lines and control points) and the resulting smooth aerial footage on the right, capturing a sunset over mountains with precise camera movements

items.title: Cinematic detail at production scale
items.description: Sub-pixel detail rendering combined with advanced texture synthesis produces footage indistinguishable from camera-captured video. High dynamic range, accurate color science, and fine material detail meet professional production standards.
bullets: Professional depth of field and bokeh
items.image_prompt: An extreme close-up macro shot of raindrops on a rose petal at golden hour, showing intricate water droplet refraction, fine petal texture details, natural film grain, shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh, and accurate skin tones on a hand gently touching the flower

faq.question: What is Tencent WAN 2.7?
faq.answer: WAN 2.7 is Tencent's multimodal AI model capable of understanding and generating text, images, and code. It excels at vision-language tasks, mathematical reasoning, and complex problem-solving with competitive performance against leading models like GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet.

faq.question: Is Tencent WAN 2.7 free to use?
faq.answer: Tencent WAN 2.7 offers a free tier through Tencent Cloud's AI platform with limited API calls. Pricing follows a pay-as-you-go model based on token usage. Enterprise plans with higher rate limits and dedicated support are available for production deployments.

faq.question: What are WAN 2.7's key strengths compared to other AI models?
faq.answer: WAN 2.7 demonstrates strong performance in multimodal understanding, particularly for Chinese language tasks, mathematical reasoning, and code generation. It offers competitive pricing and seamless integration with Tencent Cloud services, making it ideal for Asia-Pacific deployments with lower latency.

faq.question: Can WAN 2.7 process images and text together?
faq.answer: Yes, WAN 2.7 is a fully multimodal model that can analyze images, charts, diagrams, and documents while responding to text prompts. It handles visual question answering, OCR, image captioning, and vision-based reasoning tasks with high accuracy across multiple languages.

faq.question: How do I start using Tencent WAN 2.7?
faq.answer: Access WAN 2.7 through Tencent Cloud's AI platform by creating an account, obtaining API credentials, and making REST API calls. SDKs are available for Python, JavaScript, and other languages. Documentation includes quickstart guides, code examples, and integration tutorials.

bottomCta.title: Create Cinematic AI Videos with WAN 2.7
bottomCta.description: Generate high-quality videos with advanced motion control, precise camera movements, and cinematic consistency. Start creating professional AI video content in minutes.
